name: Marry’s Mission
original_name: ภารกิจคว้าหัวใจของยัยแมรี่
overview: "Marry", the owner of the beautiful flower shop, was told by her grandfather to hurry up and get married before the age of 30, but... Where will Marry find a man? This job has to be in the hands of "Sunny", the best friend who volunteered to find a man for Marry to look after her.

trailers.title: Marry's Mission ภารกิจคว้าหัวใจของยัยแมรี่ l OFFICIAL TEASER
